title: cryptostylis zeylanica
intro: Cryptostylis zeylanica, also known as the yellow helmet orchid, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used in medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Cryptostylis zeylanica include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and leaves are often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions that can be taken to harness its medicinal properties.
